positive: A majestic, stylized cosmic otter floating through a nebula. The otter has clean, bold silhouette and expressive pose, surrounded by swirling pastel and neon gas clouds in deep midnight blue and violet. Style is modern graphic illustration with linocut aesthetic accents. Central composition, perfect for a screen print on apparel. Dramatic, high contrast lighting that makes the silhouette pop against the vibrant background. Clean vector lines, flat design principles mixed with photorealistic cosmic depth. Minimalist, highly scalable.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, watermark, signature, logo, text, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, grainy, gradient falloff, --ar 16:9
